docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TEMPLETON, RODNEY AS TO DEFENDANT CHURCHILL, MARIQUETA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEMPLETON, RODNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHURCHILL, MARIQUETA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE HEARD BY PRO TEM JUDGE STEVEN MACDONALD IN DEPT 7
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CHURCHILL, MARIQUETA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23015, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEMPLETON, RODNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHURCHILL, MARIQUETA $4,220.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,235.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23015 ON 3-10-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHURCHILL, MARIQUETA
